MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Order To Show Cause Why You, Your Agents, Assigns, Employees, Partners, And All Those Acting In Concert With You Should Not Be Restrained And Enjoined From The Following Acts/Conduct: Trustee Sale Of The Property Located At 275 9th Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94118 is OFF CALENDAR.
